content: {"file": "backend/api/job_registry.py", "summary": "This file contains an in-memory registry for tracking submitted assessment jobs, primarily used to support the dashboard's job list feature. It includes functions to register new jobs and list all registered jobs.", "rules": [{"name": "register_assess_job", "description": "Registers a new assessment job with details such as job ID, PPM number, PPM name, system name, and creation timestamp.", "conditions": ["job_id", "ppm_number", "ppm_name", "system_name"], "actions": ["append the job details to _jobs list"]}, {"name": "list_assess_jobs", "description": "Returns a reversed copy of all registered assessment jobs.", "conditions": [], "actions": ["return reversed(_jobs)"]}], "dependencies": []}
